    Methods in com.wip.controller that return types with arguments of type ParcelDto
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ParcelDto>
    ParcelController.addParcel(@Valid ParcelDto parcelDto)
    Creates a new parcel booking for an existing customer.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<List<ParcelDto>>
    ParcelController.getAllParcels()
    Retrieves a list of all parcel bookings registered in the system.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ParcelDto>
    ParcelController.getParcelById(Long id)
    Retrieves the details of a single parcel identified by its unique ID.
    org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<ParcelDto>
    ParcelController.updateParcel(Long id, @Valid ParcelDto parcelDto)
    Updates an existing parcel booking with new data.

    ParcelUiController.saveParcel(@Valid ParcelDto parcelDto, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
    Processes the submission of the new parcel creation form and persists the booking.

    ParcelController.updateParcel(Long id, @Valid ParcelDto parcelDto)
    Updates an existing parcel booking with new data.

    ParcelUiController.updateParcel(Long id, @Valid ParcelDto parcelDto, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
    Processes the submission of the parcel edit form and persists the updated booking details.

    ParcelService.getAllParcels()
    Retrieves all parcel records visible to the currently authenticated user.

    Retrieves all parcels belonging to a specific customer.

    Searches for parcel records matching the given keyword across multiple fields.
